requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Marking — RCM and EESS

summary.en: The Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) regulates in-scope low-voltage electrical equipment for household, personal, or similar use in participating Australian jurisdictions. An Australian or New Zealand Responsible Supplier must register, make a Responsible Supplier Declaration that the equipment is electrically safe and meets relevant standards, register Level 2 and Level 3 equipment where required, and mark compliant in-scope equipment with the Regulatory Compliance Mark (RCM) in accordance with AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2. Whether a standalone battery pack or power bank is in scope depends on voltage, design, supplied charger/adaptor, and product configuration.
summary.zh: 电气设备安全体系（EESS）在澳大利亚参与辖区监管供家庭、个人或类似用途的适用低压电气设备。澳大利亚或新西兰责任供应商必须注册，作出责任供应商声明，确认设备电气安全且符合相关标准；按要求注册2级和3级设备；并按AS/NZS 4417.1和AS/NZS 4417.2在合规适用设备上标示RCM。独立电池组或移动电源是否纳入范围，取决于电压、设计、随附充电器/适配器及产品配置。
summary.zht: 電氣設備安全體系（EESS）在澳洲參與轄區監管供家庭、個人或類似用途的適用低壓電氣設備。澳洲或紐西蘭責任供應商必須登記，作出責任供應商聲明，確認設備電氣安全且符合相關標準；按要求登記2級和3級設備；並按AS/NZS 4417.1和AS/NZS 4417.2在合規適用設備上標示RCM。獨立電池組或行動電源是否納入範圍，取決於電壓、設計、隨附充電器/適配器及產品配置。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) participating-jurisdiction electrical safety laws and Equipment Safety Rules — mandatory where equipment is in scope
Responsible Supplier registration and declaration — mandatory for in-scope equipment
Regulatory Compliance Mark (RCM) marking under AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2 — mandatory for compliant in-scope equipment
AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2 — marking standards referenced by EESS; technical standards otherwise operate as evidence routes unless incorporated

summary.en: China exporters may hold CCC certificates for chargers, adaptors, power supplies, or battery-related products in the CCC catalogue, plus GB 4943.1, GB 31241, or other GB test reports. CCC is a China-market approval and is not an RCM/EESS registration. Australian market placement normally requires an Australian or New Zealand Responsible Supplier to control declarations, registrations, compliance folders, and RCM marking.
summary.zh: 中国出口商可能持有充电器、适配器、电源或CCC目录内电池相关产品的CCC证书，以及GB 4943.1、GB 31241或其他GB检测报告。CCC是中国市场准入，不是RCM/EESS注册。澳大利亚上市通常需要由澳大利亚或新西兰责任供应商控制声明、注册、合规文件夹及RCM标识。
summary.zht: 中國出口商可能持有充電器、適配器、電源或CCC目錄內電池相關產品的CCC證書，以及GB 4943.1、GB 31241或其他GB檢測報告。CCC是中國市場准入，不是RCM/EESS登記。澳洲上市通常需要由澳洲或紐西蘭責任供應商控制聲明、登記、合規文件夾及RCM標識。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for products in the CNCA catalogue
GB 4943.1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety
GB 31241-2022 — portable lithium cell and battery safety

gap.en: The Australian gap is the local Responsible Supplier and registration layer. A Chinese factory cannot simply apply a China CCC approval to Australia; the Australian importer must classify the product under EESS, identify whether it is Level 1, 2, or 3 in-scope equipment, hold evidence of compliance with relevant standards, register the supplier and equipment where required, and apply RCM only when the EESS conditions are met.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚差距在于本地责任供应商及注册层。中国工厂不能简单地将中国CCC批准套用于澳大利亚；澳大利亚进口商必须依据EESS对产品分类，确认是否属于1级、2级或3级适用设备，持有符合相关标准的证据，按要求完成供应商及设备注册，并仅在满足EESS条件时使用RCM。
gap.zht: 澳洲差距在於本地責任供應商及登記層。中國工廠不能簡單地將中國CCC批准套用於澳洲；澳洲進口商必須依據EESS對產品分類，確認是否屬於1級、2級或3級適用設備，持有符合相關標準的證據，按要求完成供應商及設備登記，並僅在滿足EESS條件時使用RCM。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EESS responsible-supplier obligations, Level 2/3 equipment registration, and RCM marking apply to in-scope electrical equipment in participating jurisdictions; AS/NZS technical standards support evidence and marking but should not be described as standalone mandatory unless incorporated
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — CCC may be mandatory for China-market products in scope, but it does not replace Responsible Supplier registration, EESS evidence, or RCM marking

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For power banks sold with chargers, plug packs, wireless-charging bases, or mains-powered accessories, perform EESS classification early. The likely Australian compliance owner is the local Responsible Supplier, not the Chinese factory, and RCM should be applied only after the EESS evidence and registration checks are complete.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于随附充电器、插墙电源、无线充底座或市电供电配件的移动电源，应尽早进行EESS分类。澳大利亚合规责任主体通常是本地责任供应商，而非中国工厂；只有在完成EESS证据及注册核查后才应使用RCM。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於隨附充電器、插牆電源、無線充底座或市電供電配件的行動電源，應盡早進行EESS分類。澳洲合規責任主體通常是本地責任供應商，而非中國工廠；只有在完成EESS證據及登記核查後才應使用RCM。
